name: Chipped Beef Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, soak the chipped beef in hot water until softened, then drain.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan.
3. Add flour to the melted butter and stir until blended.
4. Whisk in milk and stir over medium heat until thickened, about 2 minutes.
5. Add the drained chipped beef.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
